title: fiyrsky
description: my custom items texture pack for hypixel skyblock 1.21  and 1.8.9
body:
**fiyrsky is a 32x custom weapons overlay for hypixel skyblock 1.21 **
it is updated when i have the time to but currently contains all slayer weapons and some other commonly used ones like the heealing wands / swords. some items will be shown here howeveer the full gallery is viewable on my discord. 1.8.9 will be recieving no more updates

the 1.21 pack **REQUIRES** Firmament to work and custom items to be turned on.
the 1.8.9 pack **REQUIRES** optifine to work and custom items tuned on.

any feedback is helpful and if you want anything specific adding reach out on discord and i wil work on it asap.

**to do list:**

continue adding new items 
add some custom mob textures
